connection.description: Network endpoints, API credentials, wallet key, LLM provider settings, and runtime mode. These values are also propagated to environment variables on startup.

risk.description: Global capital limits that cap exposure regardless of how many positions look attractive.

screening.description: Filters applied when scanning for new pool candidates. Tighten these to reduce noise; loosen them to explore more pools.

management.description: Rules for managing open positions: claims, rebalances, stop-loss, take-profit, trailing stops, and cooldowns.

strategy.description: LP bin placement strategy. Determines how liquidity is distributed relative to the active price bin.

schedule.description: Cadence for background loops. Keep managementIntervalMin shorter than outOfRangeWaitMinutes so the agent can act in time.

llm.description: LLM inference parameters and per-role model overrides. llmModel in connection acts as the global fallback.

darwin.description: Auto-evolution of signal weights based on closed-position outcomes. Weights are boosted for winning signals and decayed for losers.

hiveMind.description: Collective learning layer. Pulls shared lessons and presets from a remote HiveMind backend; pushes local lessons back.

api.description: Meridian API and LP agent relay settings. The relay is a public endpoint that allows other agents to query your open positions and performance.

pnl.description: PnL tracking source, RPC endpoint, and polling cadence for position valuation.

opportunity.description: Background opportunity poller that scans for new high-yield pools using smart-wallet and liquidity metrics.

gmgn.description: GMGN API configuration for fee routing and token analytics.

jupiter.description: Jupiter swap API credentials and referral settings.

chartIndicators.description: Technical analysis indicators (RSI, supertrend) used as entry/exit signals.
